debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
mα : MeasurableSpace α
inst✝² : DecidableEq α
inst✝¹ : MeasurableSingletonClass α
alg : Algorithm α ℝ
ν : Kernel α ℝ
inst✝ : IsMarkovKernel ν
a b : α
hab : a ≠ b
⊢ IndepFun (fun ω s => rewardByCount a s ω) (fun ω s => rewardByCount b s ω) (Bandit.measure alg ν)

failed_attempts:
apply iIndepFun.indepFun_comp (iIndepFun_rewardByCount alg ν)
  · exact (disjoint_singleton_left.mpr hab).set_prod_left Set.univ
  · exact measurable_pi_iff.mpr fun n ↦ measurable_pi_apply ⟨(a, n), rfl, Set.mem_univ n⟩
  · exact measurable_pi_iff.mpr fun n ↦ measurable_pi_apply ⟨(b, n), rfl, Set.mem_univ n⟩

exact (iIndepFun_rewardByCount alg ν).indepFun_pi (Set.disjoint_prod.mpr <| Or.inl <|
    disjoint_singleton_left.mpr hab) |>.comp (Measurable.pi fun _ ↦ measurable_pi_apply _)
    (Measurable.pi fun _ ↦ measurable_pi_apply _)

refine (iIndepFun_rewardByCount alg ν).indepFun_comp (fun _ ↦ by fun_prop) ?_
  exact Set.disjoint_range_iff.mpr fun _ _ h ↦ hab (Prod.mk.inj_iff.mp h).1

exact (iIndepFun.pi (fun c ↦ iIndepFun_rewardByCount' alg ν c)
    ((iIndepFun_rewardByCount alg ν).comp (Equiv.sigmaEquivProd α ℕ)
    (Equiv.sigmaEquivProd α ℕ).injective)).indepFun hab
(iIndepFun_rewardByCount alg ν).indepFun_pi hab

refine IndepFun.comp ((iIndepFun_rewardByCount alg ν).indepFun_pi_pi (I := {p | p.1 = a})
    (J := {p | p.1 = b}) (disjoint_left.2 fun p hp hp' ↦ hab (hp.symm.trans hp'))) ?_ ?_
  · exact measurable_pi_iff.2 fun s ↦ measurable_pi_apply ⟨(a, s), rfl⟩
  · exact measurable_pi_iff.2 fun s ↦ measurable_pi_apply ⟨(b, s), rfl⟩

refine iIndepFun.indepFun_comp (iIndepFun_rewardByCount alg ν) (a, ·) (b, ·) ?_
    (fun _ _ h ↦ (Prod.mk.inj_iff.1 h).2) (fun _ _ h ↦ (Prod.mk.inj_iff.1 h).2)
  rw [Set.disjoint_left]; rintro _ ⟨s1, rfl⟩ ⟨s2, h⟩; injection h; contradiction

have h := (iIndepFun_rewardByCount alg ν).reindex (Equiv.sigmaEquivProd α ℕ).symm
  rw [← iIndepFun_pi_iff] at h
  exact h.indepFun_pi_app hab

exact (iIndepFun_rewardByCount alg ν).indepFun_pi_disjoint
    (Set.disjoint_left.mpr fun _ hp hp' ↦ hab (hp.symm.trans hp')) |>.comp
    (measurable_pi_iff.mpr fun n ↦ measurable_pi_apply ⟨(a, n), rfl⟩)
    (measurable_pi_iff.mpr fun n ↦ measurable_pi_apply ⟨(b, n), rfl⟩)
exact (iIndepFun_rewardByCount alg ν).reindex (Equiv.sigmaEquivProd α ℕ) |>.indepFun_pi hab

have h := iIndepFun_rewardByCount alg ν
  exact h.indepFun_joint (S := {a} ×ˢ Set.univ) (T := {b} ×ˢ Set.univ)
    (Set.disjoint_left.mpr (by simp [hab])) (fun p ↦ measurable_rewardByCount p.1 p.2)
    (fun p ↦ measurable_rewardByCount p.1 p.2)

refine IndepFun.comp ((iIndepFun_rewardByCount alg ν).indepFun_pi (Set.disjoint_left.mpr ?_))
    (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)
  rintro _ ⟨s, rfl⟩ ⟨s', h⟩
  injection h with h
  exact hab h

iIndepFun.indepFun_comp (iIndepFun_rewardByCount alg ν) (fun s ↦ (a, s)) (fun s ↦ (b, s))
    (Set.disjoint_range_range.mpr fun _ _ h => hab (congr_arg Prod.fst h))

exact (iIndepFun_rewardByCount alg ν).indepFun_comp (fun s ↦ (a, s)) (fun s ↦ (b, s))
    (by simp [Set.disjoint_left, hab])
exact (iIndepFun_rewardByCount alg ν).reindex (Equiv.sigmaEquivProd α ℕ) |>.indepFun_pi_indexed hab
exact (iIndepFun_rewardByCount alg ν).reindex (Equiv.sigmaEquivProd α ℕ) |>.pi |>.indepFun hab

have h_indep := iIndepFun_rewardByCount alg ν
  let S := {p : α × ℕ | p.1 = a}
  let T := {p : α × ℕ | p.1 = b}
  have h_disj : Disjoint S T := Set.disjoint_left.mpr fun p hx hy ↦ hab (hx.symm.trans hy)
  exact h_indep.indepFun_comp h_disj
    (measurable_pi_iff.mpr fun s ↦ measurable_pi_apply ⟨(a, s), rfl⟩)
    (measurable_pi_iff.mpr fun s ↦ measurable_pi_apply ⟨(b, s), rfl⟩)

exact (iIndepFun_rewardByCount alg ν).indepFun_comp (fun _ _ h ↦ (Prod.ext_iff.1 h).2)
    (fun _ _ h ↦ (Prod.ext_iff.1 h).2) (by simp [Set.disjoint_left, hab])

exact (iIndepFun_rewardByCount alg ν).indepFun_comp (fun s ↦ (a, s)) (fun s ↦ (b, s))
    (disjoint_range_iff_forall_ne.mpr fun _ _ h ↦ hab (congr_arg Prod.fst h))

simp_rw [IndepFun, MeasurableSpace.comap_pi, ← supr_range]
  exact iIndepFun.indep_supr_disjoint (iIndepFun_rewardByCount alg ν)
    (Set.disjoint_range_iff.mpr (by simp [hab]))
exact (iIndepFun_pi_iff.mpr ((iIndepFun_rewardByCount alg ν).reindex (Equiv.sigmaEquivProd α ℕ))).indepFun hab

exact (iIndepFun_rewardByCount alg ν).indepFun_comp
    (Set.disjoint_left.mpr fun p ha hb ↦ hab (ha.symm.trans hb))
    (measurable_pi_iff.mpr fun s ↦ measurable_pi_apply ⟨(a, s), rfl⟩)
    (measurable_pi_iff.mpr fun s ↦ measurable_pi_apply ⟨(b, s), rfl⟩)

refine (iIndepFun_rewardByCount alg ν).indepFun_comp (fun _ _ h ↦ (Prod.ext_iff.1 h).2)
    (fun _ _ h ↦ (Prod.ext_iff.1 h).2) ?_ measurable_id measurable_id
  exact Set.disjoint_range_range.mpr (fun _ _ h ↦ hab (Prod.ext_iff.1 h).1)

exact (iIndepFun_rewardByCount alg ν).indepFun_comp (injective_prod_mk_right a)
    (injective_prod_mk_right b) ((disjoint_singleton_left.mpr hab).prod_right Set.univ)

exact (iIndepFun_rewardByCount alg ν).indepFun_comp (fun _ ↦ by fun_prop)
    (fun s ↦ (a, s)) (fun s ↦ (b, s)) (by simp [Set.disjoint_iff, hab])

exact (iIndepFun_rewardByCount alg ν).indepFun_pi_comp (fun n ↦ (a, n)) (fun n ↦ (b, n))
    (disjoint_left.mpr (by simp [hab]))
exact (iIndepFun_rewardByCount alg ν).reindex (Equiv.sigmaEquivProd α ℕ).symm |>.pi.indepFun hab

refine (iIndepFun_rewardByCount alg ν).indepFun_comp (fun s ↦ (a, s)) (fun s ↦ (b, s)) ?_
  simp [Set.disjoint_left, hab]

exact iIndepFun.indepFun_comp (iIndepFun_rewardByCount alg ν)
    (Set.disjoint_left.mpr fun x ha hb ↦ hab (ha.symm.trans hb))
    (measurable_pi_iff.mpr fun s ↦ measurable_pi_apply ⟨(a, s), rfl⟩)
    (measurable_pi_iff.mpr fun s ↦ measurable_pi_apply ⟨(b, s), rfl⟩)
exact ((iIndepFun_rewardByCount alg ν).reindex Equiv.sigmaEquivProd).indepFun_pi_app hab

refine (iIndepFun_rewardByCount alg ν).indepFun_comp (fun s ↦ (a, s)) (fun s ↦ (b, s)) ?_
  rw [Set.disjoint_left]
  rintro _ ⟨s, rfl⟩ ⟨s', h⟩
  exact hab (congrArg Prod.fst h)
